text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The clinical brightness of glass and steel in the entryway gives way to the colorful, thoughtful design of the exhibit space. The focus on 'Responsive and rapidly evolving Research + Development' excites my philosophical imagination—there is potential here for profound questions about humanity's relationship with machines, the nature of innovation, and how we connect with the unknown. I am eager, even slightly awed, to encounter what ideas will unfold.
